title: [codereview-pass2] time-provider interaction now referenced in modulo but needs stronger MUST
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:117 - Pass2: The ref to §2a.4.2 is added but robustness requires explicit 'MUST validate ts >= epoch_floor independent of SFN modulo wrap per time-provider spec' in the SFN subsection. P2. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-yne7
notes: Chunk 1: Strengthened MUST statement in 2a.4.1 SFN modulo section (lines 121) to explicitly require independent ts >= epoch_floor validation independent of SFN wrap per time-provider spec. Updated cross-ref to spec/09-packets-timing.md:176. Now running 3 codereview passes before closure.
